questionHtml: Outline one effect of increased levels of low-density lipoproteins in the blood.
markschemeHtml:
Any one of:

atherosclerosis/cholesterol deposition «in artery walls» ✔

heart/cardiovascular disease ✔

stroke ✔

 

Accept “arteries become blocked/walls become thicker”.

meta.title: Outline one effect of increased levels of low-density lipoproteins in the blood.
